title: Mid-Sized In-Room Card Design

There should also be a small note saying something like: “Already booked? No problem - simply mention this card on arrival to enjoy your complimentary drink.” I’m looking for something stylish, understated, and well-designed rather than overly promotional. Budget: aroun

title: Packaging Designer for Bourbon Brand
desc: We're looking for an experienced packaging designer to refine and productionize a premium bourbon label system for Misunderstood Whiskey Co. The project is a hyper-local bourbon release series with custom "Greetings From" postcard-inspired labels for different towns and regions. Creative direction is already established - we need someone to sharpen the system and get it production-ready. What You'll Do - Refine and present front and back label design options - Prepare print-ready files and dielines - Advise on materials, finishes, and production methods - Structure labels for TTB/COLA compliance - Build scalable templates for future town releases - Assist with neck labels, closures, and secondary packaging Requirements -Experience designing liquor, wine, or spirits packaging Familiarity with TTB label requirements. - Knowledge of premium production methods: pressure-sensitive labels, foil stamping, embossing/debossing, textured stocks, screen printing - Strong typography and layout skills - Ability to deliver clean, production-ready files Style Direction - Modern premium bourbon - Americana-influenced, clean hierarchy, restrained typography. Collectible but credible. Think contemporary premium bourbon, not rustic craft. Deliverables - 2–4 refined label directions - Front/back lab

title: Personal Ooty Landscape Photography
desc: I’m putting together a private collection of large-format prints that capture Ooty’s sweeping tea estates, mist-laden valleys and quiet lakesides. This is strictly for personal enjoyment, so every frame should feel intimate and timeless—something I can hang on my wall and relive the trip through. I already have several favourite viewpoints earmarked (think Nilgiri Mountain Railway bends and secluded Toda hamlets), yet I’m also keen to explore any hidden gems you know. Your local insight into changing light, weather pockets and crowd-free vantage points will be invaluable. Here’s what I need from you: • Plan the shoot around golden or blue hours, advising on the best sequence of stops. • Photograph in RAW with a full-frame DSLR or mirrorless; a drone pass for aerial context would be a welcome bonus. • Deliver at least 20 fully edited, colour-balanced JPEGs ready for large-scale printing (4,000 px+ on the long edge) plus the untouched RAW files. • Include a short note on each location—helpful when I later caption my prints and photobook. If you have a portfolio featuring hill-station landscapes (especially Ooty), the gear list you’ll bring and your earliest availability, please share them so we can lock in dates. Looking forward to seeing Ooty through your lens!

title: Pre-Workout Supplement Label Designer — Dark, Premium, Clinical Aesthetic
desc: We're launching KP⁷ — a UK pre-workout supplement built around Kaempferia parviflora (black ginger) extract. One SKU. We need a front and back label designed for a black HDPE tub (~500ml, wide-mouth). Print-ready files plus a 3D mockup. A bottle design reference image is attached. This shows the correct tub shape, colourway, logo, and visual direction. The label must be consistent with this reference. Note: the copy on the reference image is not final — do not replicate the text, only the visual style and layout. THE AESTHETIC Dark, clinical, typographic. Not aggressive fitness. Not loud colours. Think premium nootropic or pharmaceutical — controlled, precise, serious. The attached reference shows the exact direction: black tub, white/purple type, botanical vascular motif in purple (#7F77DD). Colour palette: #1A0D24 (brand black), #7F77DD (purple accent), #C47A45 (muted orange), #7A8C5E (deep green), #D4C9A8 (dusty cream). Logo provided. Full ingredient list, UK compliance text, and nutrition table provided on hire. Full brand brief provided on hire. DELIVERABLES · Front label — print-ready AI + PDF, 300dpi · Back label — nutrition table, ingredients, UK food supplement compliance text, directions for use · 3D mockup on black HDPE tub — JPEG/PNG · All editable source files REQUIR

Mention if any fonts/icons/images used are not free/commercial-safe Design style: - Dark premium startup theme - Black / deep charcoal background - Orange, pink, purple gradient accents - Clean modern typography - Round

title: RAW Photo Editing & Retouching for Restaurant, Bar and Gym Social Media Content

I need someone with good taste, consistency and attention to detail. To apply, please send: 1. Examples of RAW photo edits, ideally before/after 2. Your price per photo or per batch of 40 photos 3. title: Traditional Japanese Ramen Poster
desc: I need a striking poster that instantly transports viewers to an authentic Japanese ramen shop and makes them crave a steaming bowl. • Purpose: promote both the restaurant itself and our food, not a one-time event. • Visual style: unmistakably Traditional Japanese—rich reds, indigo waves, subtle brush-stroke calligraphy, and any other classic motifs that feel right. • Must-have element: high-quality images of our signature ramen dishes placed prominently so the food sells itself. Please design for an A3 print, but keep everything in vectors or 300 dpi so I can scale as needed. Deliverables: 1. Print-ready PDF (CMYK, 3 mm bleed). 2. Editable source file (AI, PSD, or layered SVG) with fonts either outlined or included. 3. A quick JPG/PNG preview for online use. Keep copy minimal—restaurant name, a short tagline, address, and our social handle area can be shown as placeholders. Overall, I’m looking for a piece that blends traditional flair with mouth-watering photography. Surprise me with your best interpretation!

title: Book and Oracle Deck Layout Refinement
desc: I'm looking for an experienced Adobe InDesign user to refine and complete my book and Oracle deck layouts, ensuring both are ready for print-quality PDFs. Requirements include: - Revise and complete book layout, including text formatting, image placement, and overall design. - Finish Oracle card deck (85 cards) from photo PDFs. Tasks include: - Adding text - Layout adjustments Ideal skills and experience: - Proficiency in Adobe InDesign - Strong design sense - Attention to detail - Experience with print-ready PDF creation

title: Brand Identity and Logo Refinement
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to refine our brand identity and logo package. The ideal candidate will have experience in creating cohesive brand elements and enhancing visual appeal. Responsibilities include refining existing logos, ensuring color consistency, and creating a brand style guide. Attention to detail and creativity are essential. We are changing names and rebranding and need help refining the logo and need the full media package created including official logos/media for hats/shirts/cards etc Attached is what i have worked on so far using Chat gpt

title: Brand-Aligned PowerPoint Deck Design
desc: I need a seasoned PowerPoint designer to transform our brand guidelines into a polished, 30-plus–slide deck for an upcoming internal meeting. The tone must stay formal, and every slide should feel unmistakably “us” through consistent use of our colours, typography, iconography, and layout principles. You’ll start from the guideline document I provide and develop custom master layouts, charts, infographics, and any supporting visuals that make complex information easy to absorb for an executive audience. Subtle animation is welcome where it adds clarity but should never distract from the content. Acceptance criteria • Minimum 30 unique, on-brand slides • All text styles, colour palettes, and visual treatments follow the supplied guideline precisely • Custom graphics (icons, charts, infographics) created in-file, not pasted as flat images • File delivered as an editable .pptx with no missing fonts or linked assets If you have a portfolio of corporate decks that balance strong visual hierarchy with brand fidelity, I’d love to see it and get started right away.

title: Brochure Creation from Ebook
desc: I’m looking for a talented graphic designer to create a professional, visually appealing brochure for my business. The design should be inspired by an existing eBook that I will provide, along with a collection of assets (graphics, images, and branding elements) from that eBook for you to incorporate. The goal is to transform the style, tone, and key visual elements of the eBook into a cohesive, print- and/or digital-ready brochure that effectively communicates my business offerings. What I’ll Provide: The eBook to use as creative inspiration: download here: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FTe4yN3NwuEw_9Y7EKRjpUx9IAiMtCTD/view?usp=sharing Existing design assets (images, graphics, branding elements) Any necessary business information and copy for the brochure What I’m Looking For: Strong experience in brochure or marketing material design Ability to maintain brand consistency while elevating the design Good eye for layout, typography, and visual hierarchy Clear communication and willingness to collaborate on revisions Deliverables: Final brochure design (ready for print and/or digital use) Source files (e.g., Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, or similar) If you’re interested, please share examples of similar work you’ve done, especially brochures or materials based on existing brand a

title: Brochure Design Needed for Business
desc: Hi, I'm looking for a talented graphic designer to create a modern, professional brochure for my business. The brochure will be used for print, so I am looking for someone with experience clean, high quality brochure/catalogue design. What I need: - Modern and visually appealing design - Professional layout - Editable final files - print ready PDF supplied - Assistance with arranging content/images in a clean format I will provide: - Logo/branding - Photos -Text/content - Examples/inspiration of styles I like Please Include: - Examples of similar work - Estimated turnaround time - Your quote Look forward to working with you!

title: Brochure Design for Marketing
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional brochure for our marketing efforts. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and graphic design, with a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. The brochure should be visually appealing and effectively communicate our brand message. The project is part-time and expected to be completed in less than a month.

title: Brochure Design for Marketing Materials
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional brochure for our marketing materials. The ideal candidate will have experience in brochure design and be able to deliver high-quality, visually appealing work. The project involves designing a single-page brochure on both sides that effectively communicates our brand message and highlights our services. The design should be print-ready and align with our brand guidelines.

title: Brochure Design on Canva
desc: I need someone to design a brochure on Canva using my existing branding guidelines. The task requires proficiency in Canva and possibly other design tools. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and graphic design, ensuring the brochure aligns with my brand identity.

title: Brochure Design or Company Profile
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional brochure for our marketing materials. The brochure should effectively communicate our brand's message and appeal to our target audience. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this project.

title: Brochure Update for Marketing
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to update our existing brochure. The project involves incorporating new content, ensuring alignment with our brand, and enhancing the overall design. The ideal candidate will have experience in print design and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop. This is a part-time engagement with a short-term commitment.

title: Brochure and Business Card Design
desc: I need someone to help build a brochure or custom business card that opens in the middle. The project requires a designer with experience in print design and layout. The ideal candidate should have a strong portfolio showcasing previous work in brochure and business card design. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role.
